## Analytics Improvement

**What analytics aspect would you like to improve?**

**What type of analytics issue?**
- [ ] Google Analytics setup
- [ ] Event tracking
- [ ] Conversion tracking
- [ ] User behavior tracking
- [ ] Performance monitoring
- [ ] Error tracking
- [ ] Custom dimensions
- [ ] Goal tracking
- [ ] E-commerce tracking
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Where is this analytics element located?**
- [ ] Homepage
- [ ] About page
- [ ] Portfolio page
- [ ] Skills page
- [ ] Contact page
- [ ] Global tracking
- [ ] User interactions
- [ ] Form submissions
- [ ] Button clicks
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Current analytics implementation**
Describe what's currently implemented for analytics.

**Proposed improvement**
Describe what improvement you'd like to see.

**Analytics tools used (if any)**
- [ ] Google Analytics 4
- [ ] Google Tag Manager
- [ ] Hotjar
- [ ] Mixpanel
- [ ] Amplitude
- [ ] Adobe Analytics
- [ ] Matomo
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Specific metrics or KPIs**
What specific data or insights are you looking to track?

**Business goals**
How will this analytics improvement support business objectives?

**Data privacy considerations**
- [ ] GDPR compliance
- [ ] CCPA compliance
- [ ] Cookie consent
- [ ] Data anonymization
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the analytics improvement here.

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (missing essential data)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (moderate enhancement)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

**Note**: Better analytics help understand user behavior and improve the website!

**Note**: Data-driven decisions lead to better user experiences!

**Note**: Ensure compliance with data privacy regulations!

**Note**: Start with key metrics and expand gradually!
